title: Diversity: Better Bundle
description:
Add a crafting recipe for bundle using leather
Add 2 unique enchantments for bundle (capacity and refill) 
You can make bundle place block by toggle mode using sneak + left click> to the ground.
body:
# Diversity: Better Bundle
--- This mod is a feature from [Diversity](https://modrinth.com/mod/faewufs-diversity) (Check it out!) **Only need to be installed on server-side!** |Caution: version 1.20.1 of the mod can not be use server-side only (requires both client and server to install the mod| |---| #### Recipe:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e611c1fe54f5d1aaa92c3dbd788626d2c617a4e.png) #### Add 4 unique enchantments for bundle: - Capacity: increase bundle's size. - Refill: auto refill block when using place mode. - Vacuum: newly picked up item will store in bundle instead. - Selective Vacuum: Unlike vacuum, it only chooses the item already exists inside the bundle. **Those enchantment books available only in leatherworker villager's trades.** If mod installed in client-side, slot indicator will calculate correctly. ![Enchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kmvb6gYQ/images/95f58c747979f9636ef376edbf26b8e4650e2c3c.gif) #### You can make bundle place block by toggle mode using `sneak` + `left click` to the ground. ![Place mode](https://github.com/FaeWulf/public-imgs/blob/main/mods/Diversity/item/bundlePlaceBlocks-min.gif?raw=true) ## Required mods - `Fabric api` if using `fabric version` - Faewulf's Lib ## 👍 Support For support, feature requests, or bug reports, please visit the mod's GitHub issues page. or join my Discord server: [link](https://discord.gg/xZneCTcEvb) ## 📜 License You can use this mod in modpack as long as giving proper credits.
